Our Story

About Bocadillo

Bocadillo Deli Pizzeria is Canton's neighborhood deli and pizzeria — located at 309 Cleveland Ave NW in downtown Canton, Ohio. Detroit-style pizza, New York deli subs, specialty hot dogs. All made to order.

The Detroit-style crust has the caramelized edges and open crumb you came for. Chicago style, done correctly. Hoagies and wraps made to order, every time, with no shortcuts.

The best pizza in Canton, Ohio. Come find out why.

🍕
Detroit & Chicago Style Pizza
Crispy. Saucy. Legendary.
🌭
Specialty Hot Dogs
All-beef. Three ways. Nothing like it in Canton.
🥖
Gourmet Hoagies & Wraps
Built to impress.
✦
Everything Fresh
Made to order. Every time.
